info.name: Logo Visualizer API – Integration Tests
info.description:
End-to-end integration tests for the Logo Visualizer backend API.

Prerequisites:
  1. Docker database running: docker compose up -d
  2. API running: dotnet run --project LogoVisualizer.Api
  3. Fixtures created: node setup.js  (done automatically by `npm test`)

Requests run in order. Each folder's requests depend on state set by previous folders.

exec: pm.test('Each item has numeric id and non-empty name', () => {
pm.test('All six expected slug names are present', () => {
pm.test('Product matches created ID and title', () => {
// Export uses JsonSerializer without a naming policy → PascalCase keys
pm.test('Exported JSON has correct product shape', () => {

item.name: Get zones for non-existent product – expect 404

exec: pm.test('Response has logoId, logoUrl, contentType, fileSizeBytes', () => {

item.name: Upload logo – unsupported file type – expect 400

exec: pm.test('One product imported and ID returned', () => {
pm.test('Imported product has correct title and zone', () => {

item.name: TC-51: PNG Export – Valid request with one placement
TC-53: PNG Export – Empty placements and textPlacements
TC-59: PDF Export – Empty pages array

exec: pm.test('Response contains logo upload contract fields', () => {
pm.test('Response contains logo upload contract fields', () => {

item.name: TC-37: Upload WEBP logo – expect unsupported format
TC-62: POST with malformed Bearer token – expect 401
TC-02: Create product with empty title – expect validation error
TC-05: Create product with 501-character title – expect validation error
TC-14: Add zone with empty name – expect validation error
TC-16: Add zone with 201-character name – expect validation error
TC-17: Add zone at origin (x=0, y=0)
TC-19: Add zone with negative X – expect validation error
TC-20: Add zone with negative Y – expect validation error
TC-23: Add zone with width=0 – expect validation error
TC-24: Add zone with height=0 – expect validation error
TC-43: Import .txt file – expect 400 Bad Request
TC-44: Import malformed JSON – expect 400 Bad Request
